SEARCH
Package client

Interface MessageListener<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of message expected
All Known Implementing Classes:
BarcodeScannerController, BillController, CheckOutController, ForgetCodeController, GetTableController, ManagerOptionsController, MonthlyReportsController, OrderUi_controller, PaymentController, RegisterEmployeeController, RegisterSubscriberController, ReportsController, ReservationController, RestaurantLoginController, SetEmployeePasswordController, SubscriberHistoryController, SubscriberLoginController, SubscriberManagementController, SubscriberOptionController, TableManagementController, UpdateProfileController, WaitingListController
public interface MessageListener<T>
Interface for receiving messages from the server. Classes implementing this interface can register to receive asynchronous server messages.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onMessageReceive(T msg)
    Called when a message is received from the server.

  • Method Details

    • onMessageReceive

      void onMessageReceive(T msg)
      Called when a message is received from the server.
      Parameters:
      msg - The message object
